name: Niagara Transit
overrideNote: Niagara Transit’s GTFS feed included auxiliary two- and three-stop records for routes 209 and 216 that made those routes appear to run every 1–5 minutes. We filtered those records so the map reflects the published 30-minute-plus service. Separately, routes 301 and 401 don't consistently use direction to mean outbound vs. inbound — one direction bucket mixes trips from two unrelated destinations under the same generic headsign — which made the Hospital stop look far more frequent than the real 30-minute (301) / hourly (401) service. We corrected the frequency calculation to stop conflating those trips. See issues #194 and #243.
